title: Miraloma Park Reviews
content: It's nice and quiet but very foggy! I enjoy the easy access to many buses and trains. The ice cream truck that comes around is fun too :).

title: SF's Miraloma among storied playground hoops hotspots ...
content: Over the past 50 years, the basketball court at Miraloma Playground has provided more than 1,000 San Franciscans an escape from daily stresses.
